packages.name: anstyle
packages.description: ANSI text styling

packages.name: cc
packages.description:
A build-time dependency for Cargo build scripts to assist in invoking the native
C compiler to compile native C code into a static archive to be linked into Rust
code.

packages.name: cfg-if
packages.description:
A macro to ergonomically define an item depending on a large number of #[cfg]
parameters. Structured like an if-else chain, the first matching branch is the
item that gets emitted.

packages.name: downcast
packages.description: Trait for downcasting trait objects back to their original types.

packages.name: find-msvc-tools
packages.description: Find windows-specific tools, read MSVC versions from the registry and from COM interfaces

packages.name: fragile
packages.description: Provides wrapper types for sending non-send values to other threads.

packages.name: lazy_static
packages.description: A macro for declaring lazily evaluated statics in Rust.

packages.name: mockall
packages.description: A powerful mock object library for Rust.

packages.name: mockall_derive
packages.description: Procedural macros for Mockall

packages.name: predicates
packages.description: An implementation of boolean-valued predicate functions.

packages.name: predicates-core
packages.description: An API for boolean-valued predicate functions.

packages.name: predicates-tree
packages.description: Render boolean-valued predicate functions results as a tree.

packages.name: proc-macro2
packages.description: A substitute implementation of the compiler's `proc_macro` API to decouple token-based libraries from the procedural macro use case.

packages.name: quote
packages.description: Quasi-quoting macro quote!(...)

packages.name: serde
packages.description: A generic serialization/deserialization framework

packages.name: serde_core
packages.description: Serde traits only, with no support for derive -- use the `serde` crate instead

packages.name: serde_derive
packages.description: Macros 1.1 implementation of #[derive(Serialize, Deserialize)]

packages.name: shlex
packages.description: Split a string into shell words, like Python's shlex.

packages.name: syn
packages.description: Parser for Rust source code

packages.name: termtree
packages.description: Visualize tree-like data on the command-line

packages.name: unicode-ident
packages.description: Determine whether characters have the XID_Start or XID_Continue properties according to Unicode Standard Annex #31
